proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +42.5pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +42.5pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +42.5pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61 below the Tier S threshold. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 4), so the cohort is dormant and the flagged 100% Choppy concentration is not compounded by a Bear-gated promotion. Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-07-09) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: BULL_PROXY × Bear: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=BULL_PROXY, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +29.9pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.98 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
R-multiple 0.98 sits just under Tier S threshold; D-8 forced-exit dominance could further compress R and drive future demotion
Small n=17 means one or two adverse Bear-regime trades could shift Wilson lower toward Tier M floor
approval would propagate redundant to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +29.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +29.9pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 4), so the cohort is dormant; portfolio Bear exposure is 0 and the flagged 100% Choppy concentration is on a different regime, so a Bear-gated BULL_PROXY promotion does not compound concentration risk and may diversify when Bear re-emerges. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19 through 07-09) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector×regime = Choppy regime (100%); cells BULL_PROXY×Choppy×Auto, UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma, BULL_PROXY×Choppy×CapGoods each at 33.33% (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector×regime = Choppy regime (100%); cells BULL_PROXY×Choppy×Auto, UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma, BULL_PROXY×Choppy×CapGoods each at 33.33%; recommended action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) a non-Choppy position opens to dilute regime share below 80%, or (b) Choppy×BULL_PROXY / Choppy×UP_TRI cohorts advance to Tier M. Given the small book (3 positions), avoid adding a 4th Choppy position of any signal type until dilution occurs.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: If regime shifts from Choppy to Bear or a sharp trend breakout, all 3 positions sit in the same regime bucket with unvalidated edge — a synchronized adverse move could hit the entire book simultaneously with no offsetting exposure across regimes or signal directions.

evidence: All three cells at 33.33% share, each breaching the 0.20 cell threshold
Choppy×BULL_PROXY cohort at Candidate tier (n=31) — unvalidated edge
Choppy×UP_TRI cohort at Candidate tier (n=294) — unvalidated edge
Book is small (3 open) so any single stop hits ~33% of exposure
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (100%); cells BULL_PROXY×Choppy×Auto, UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma, BULL_PROXY×Choppy×CapGoods each at 33.33%
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) a non-Choppy position opens to dilute regime share below 80%, or (b) Choppy×BULL_PROXY / Choppy×UP_TRI cohorts advance to Tier M. Given the small book (3 positions), avoid adding a 4th Choppy position of any signal type until dilution occurs.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: If regime shifts from Choppy to Bear or a sharp trend breakout, all 3 positions sit in the same regime bucket with unvalidated edge — a synchronized adverse move could hit the entire book simultaneously with no offsetting exposure across regimes or signal directions.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration is triggered at 1.0 (100% Choppy, well above the 0.80 threshold) with all three concentrated cells matching only Candidate-tier cohorts — unvalidated edge. Additionally, every single cell breaches the 0.20 threshold at 33.33% share (3 positions split 1/1/1 across three cells), making cell concentration a mechanical breach. Signal mix (BULL_PROXY 66.7%, UP_TRI 33.3%) is within tolerance, but the regime monoculture + cell breaches on unvalidated cohorts is the actionable risk.
